entries.source: "Create geography flashcards"
entries.value: "Cruthaigh spléachchártaí tíreolaíochta"

entries.source: "Make flashcards for mitosis"
entries.value: "Déan spléachchártaí don mhiotóis"

entries.source: "Turn this note into Q&A"
entries.value: "Tiontaigh an nóta seo ina C&F"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Flashcard Builder on inspir for practice learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Treoir phraiticiúil ar Flashcard Builder a úsáid ar inspir le haghaidh foghlaim chleachtaidh, le prasaí, lúba staidéir, agus nósanna IS níos sábháilte.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Lúb staidéir níos láidre

entries.source: AI Flashcard Builder For Active Recall is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn notes or topics into clear flashcards with answers, traps, and review prompts.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Tógálaí Spléachchártaí IS don Chuimhne Ghníomhach chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: tiontaigh nótaí nó ábhair ina spléachchártaí soiléire le freagraí, gaistí, agus prasaí athbhreithnithe.

entries.source: AI Flashcard Builder For Active Recall: practical guide
entries.value: Tógálaí Spléachchártaí IS don Chuimhne Ghníomhach: treoir phraiticiúil

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Teagascóir IS

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Iarr céad chéim bheag seachas freagra deiridh.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Iarr ar an IS do réasúnaíocht a sheiceáil, ní an toradh amháin.

entries.source: Cards ask one thing at a time and include traps so review builds understanding, not just recognition.
entries.value: Cuireann na cártaí ceist amháin ag an am agus áiríonn siad gaistí, ionas go dtógann an t-athbhreithniú tuiscint, ní hamháin aithint.

entries.source: Create recall cards.
entries.value: Cruthaigh cártaí cuimhne.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Críochnaigh trí an smaoineamh a scríobh ar ais ó chuimhne.

entries.source: Flashcard Builder
entries.value: Tógálaí Splancchártaí

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Cleachtadh

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prasaí le triail

entries.source: Reveal answers when ready.
entries.value: Nocht freagraí nuair atá tú réidh.

entries.source: Review misses sooner.
entries.value: Athbhreithnigh botúin níos luaithe.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Flashcard Builder. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Memory Palace. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Tosaigh an mód beo ag Flashcard Builder. Más mian leat formáid foghlama chomharsanachta, bain triail as Memory Palace. Le haghaidh léargas níos leithne ar an ardán, léigh cad ba chóir do chompánach foghlama IS a dhéanamh do chách.

entries.source: Students preparing for exams, language learners, and anyone using retrieval practice.
entries.value: Scoláirí atá ag ullmhú do scrúduithe, foghlaimeoirí teanga, agus aon duine a úsáideann cleachtadh aisghabhála.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Inis don mhód cad atá tú ag iarraidh a fhoghlaim nó a tháirgeadh.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Taispeánann an difríocht sin í féin sa sreabhadh. In ionad freagra ollmhór amháin, bogann na seisiúin is fearr trí lúb: socraigh sprioc, bain triail as rud éigin, faigh aiseolas, deisigh an pointe lag, agus roghnaigh an chéad ghníomh eile.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Tá an fócas sin tábhachtach. Is féidir le chatbot ginearálta beagnach aon rud a fhreagairt, ach tugann mód foghlama cruth don chomhrá. Spreagann sé thú i dtreo an chineáil smaointeoireachta, cleachtaidh, aiseolais, nó fiosraithe a chabhraíonn leis an smaoineamh fanacht.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Is é seo an nós céanna taobh thiar de staidéar le IS gan caimiléireacht a dhéanamh ort féin: coinnigh an foghlaimeoir gníomhach. Is úsáidí IS nuair a thugann sí aiseolas ar do smaointeoireacht.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Tá an mód seo thar a bheith úsáideach d’fhoghlaimeoirí ar mian leo:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Bain triail as an gcéim i d’fhocail féin.

entries.source: Use Flashcard Builder when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Flashcard Builder nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Cad leis a gcabhraíonn an mód seo

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Cá háit le dul ina dhiaidh sin

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Is féidir leat tosú freisin le leagan garbh de d’fhadhb fhíor. Tá céad phras míshlachtmhar ceart go leor. Is féidir leis an seisiún an leibhéal, an lucht féachana, an spriocdháta, agus an stíl a shoiléiriú nuair a thosaíonn tú.
